bridle 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference

Hint Expression Evaluator

Source: R/hint_evaluator.R
hint_evaluator.Rd

Evaluates computable_hint R expressions in a restricted sandbox environment. Shared by GraphEngine (#57) and KnowledgeRetriever (#58).

Details

Defence-in-depth: plugin YAML is community-reviewed but we still use baseenv() as parent (blocks system(), file.*(), etc.) and setTimeLimit() to prevent infinite loops (ADR-0003, rule 2-4).

Contents

Developed by Katsuya Shibuki.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
